display.purpose: Homepage h1 only. One per page.

headline.purpose: Slide titles, module headings, section headings.

title.purpose: Module list titles, sidebar module name, nav cards.

body.purpose: Slide prose. Max 65–75ch in reading contexts.

label.purpose: Eyebrow labels, type markers, section dividers. Always uppercase.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default for color and border state transitions (hover, focus).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Ink fill, Paper text, ember on hover. Sharp corners.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Start reading <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 48px; padding: 0 20px; background: #0a0a0a; color: #fafafa; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #d85a30; color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d85a30; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent, full ink border, ember on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost">Browse modules <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2 3h6a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v14a3 3 0 0 0-3-3H2z"/><path d="M22 3h-6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v14a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h7z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 48px; padding: 0 20px; background: transparent; color: #0a0a0a; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border: 1px solid rgba(10,10,10,0.18); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #d85a30; color: #d85a30; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d85a30; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Site Header
components.description: Sticky header with semi-transparent blur. Logo left, nav right.
components.html:
Untangled
ModulesStart
components.css: .ds-header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 20; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; padding: 0 20px; background: rgba(250,250,250,0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(10,10,10,0.10); } .ds-header-logo { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0a0a0a; text-decoration: none; } .ds-header-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; } .ds-header-link { font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(10,10,10,0.70); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-header-link:hover { color: #0a0a0a; }

components.name: Module Card
components.description: List entry separated by top border only. No background, no shadow, no radius.
components.html:
01

The Machine

What a computer actually is.

Open module
components.css: .ds-module-card { border-top: 1px solid rgba(10,10,10,0.12); padding: 24px 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-module-card { flex-direction: row; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; } } .ds-module-card-body { flex: 1; } .ds-module-card-number { font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #737373; } .ds-module-card-title { margin-top: 8px; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-module-card-theme { margin-top: 8px; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.75; color: rgba(10,10,10,0.70); max-width: 36rem; } .ds-module-card-cta { flex-shrink: 0; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid #0a0a0a; }

components.name: Navigation Card (Previous / Next)
components.description: Prev/next slide navigation. Full border, serif title, ember on hover.
components.html: NextBinary and the Logic Gate
components.css: .ds-nav-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; min-height: 96px; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(10,10,10,0.12); text-decoration: none; color: #0a0a0a; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-card:hover { border-color: #d85a30; color: #d85a30; } .ds-nav-card-label { font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(10,10,10,0.60); } .ds-nav-card:hover .ds-nav-card-label { color: rgba(216,90,48,0.70); } .ds-nav-card-title { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 4px; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-nav-card--next { text-align: right; justify-content: flex-end; } .ds-nav-card--next .ds-nav-card-title { justify-content: flex-end; }

components.name: Callout
components.description: Inline MDX aside for key ideas. Ember left border, tinted background, uppercase label.
components.html:
Hold onto this

The order field, not the filename, drives linear progression. This allows inserting slides without renaming existing files.
components.css: .ds-callout { margin: 32px 0; max-width: 42rem; border-left: 4px solid #d85a30; background: rgba(10,10,10,0.035); padding: 16px 20px; } .ds-callout-label { font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #d85a30; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-callout-body { font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 2; color: rgba(10,10,10,0.86); }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Uppercase tracked label used for section markers, module numbers, type tags.
components.html: AI from zero
components.css: .ds-label { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #d85a30; }

narrative.overview:
Untangled feels like a beautifully typeset book written by an expert who trusts your intelligence. Every surface is considered the way a page layout is considered: whitespace is structural, not decorative; type hierarchy is what carries meaning; the single accent exists to mark moments that matter, not to decorate. The experience is unhurried — it never rushes you, never demands your attention with motion or color. It gives the ideas room to land.

The system is built on near-black on near-white (or the inverse in dark mode) with a single coral/terracotta accent that warms as the content arc moves toward the present. The sketch surface — a subtle crosshatch grid — is the only texture in the system, and it exists to ground the illustrative, hand-drawn quality of the content without competing with it. Nothing else is decorative.

This design system explicitly rejects what the product rejects: course-platform conventions, corporate editorial warmth, and the edtech cliché of endless identical card grids.
keyCharacteristics: Sharp corners everywhere (radius: 0). Geometry does not need to soften.
One accent, used with strict economy. Its rarity is the signal.
Generous vertical rhythm. Slide content breathes. Margins are not filled.
Serif for headings, neutral sans for body. Editorial without being precious.
Dark mode as a first-class experience, not an afterthought.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Ember appears on ≤10% of any surface. Every additional use dilutes the signal. When in doubt, remove it.

rules.name: The Opacity System Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce new color values for border tints, text secondary, or hover backgrounds. Use opacity variants of foreground. The system scales cleanly to dark mode because it has no hardcoded grays.

rules.name: The Serif-for-Ideas Rule
rules.body: Cormorant Garamond is for what the reader needs to understand. Inter is for what the interface needs to communicate. Do not use serif in navigation, buttons, labels, or form elements.

rules.name: The Tight Display Rule
rules.body: Display type uses line-height: 0.95. At large sizes, default leading creates too much air. The tightness is the drama.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces sit at the same plane. box-shadow is absent from the system. If an element needs to feel elevated, use a full border or a tinted background, not a shadow.

rules.name: The One Blur Exception
rules.body: The site header uses backdrop-blur at 88% background opacity. This is the only blur in the system. It is not a design choice to replicate elsewhere.

rules.name: The No-Container Card Rule
rules.body: Module cards have no background, no radius, no shadow. They are entries in a list, separated by lines. Adding a background or elevation to them is forbidden.

dos: Do use foreground/N opacity variants for all border tints, secondary text, and hover backgrounds.
Do use Ember only for interactive states, progress markers, key eyebrow labels, and moments that earn the reader's attention.
Do use sharp corners (border-radius: 0) on all interactive elements.
Do use the Label style (uppercase, tracked, 600 weight, 12px) for all eyebrow labels and secondary section markers.
Do cap body prose at 65–75ch in single-column reading layouts.
Do maintain the flat elevation system. Use borders or tinted backgrounds, not shadows.
Do support dark mode through CSS custom property inversion.
donts: Don't use box-shadow. The system has no drop shadows.
Don't add border-radius to buttons, cards, or containers.
Don't introduce a second accent. Ember is the single accent.
Don't make the interface feel like a course platform: no persistent progress bars in navigation, no achievement badges, no gamified streaks.
Don't use card grids with identical icon + heading + body repeated.
Don't use Cormorant Garamond in navigation, buttons, labels, or form elements.
Don't replicate the sketch surface texture in more than one location.
Don't design for Coursera, Duolingo, or Medium aesthetics.
